title: Karnataka High Court orders FIR against cop accused of attacking advocate at police station
description: The Karnataka High Court recently ordered the registration of a criminal case against a police officer accused kicking an advocate who had visited a police station to file a road rage complaint [Nabonita Sen v State by Station House Officer].The incident took place after the lawyer allegedly shoved papers kept on the tables onto the floor when she was made to wait for hours to register her complaint. In retaliation, a policewoman on night patrol is alleged to have attacked the lawyer by kicking
